name: Breadbasket
description: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus +55% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10s. Max stack is 3.
perfectDescription: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus +70% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10s. Max stack is 2.

name: Killer
description: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +70% critical hit damage for 10s.
perfectDescription: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +90% critical hit damage for 10s.

name: Preservation
description: Killing an enemy repairs 10% armor over 5s. Headshot kills improve the repair by an additional 10%.
perfectDescription: Killing an enemy repairs 15% armor over 5s. Headshot kills improve the repair by an additional 15%.

name: Optimist
description: Weapon damage is increased by +3.5% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.
perfectDescription: Weapon damage is increased by +4.5% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.

name: Strained
description: Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5s you are firing. Stacks up to 5 times.
perfectDescription: Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5s you are firing. Stacks up to 8 times.

name: Close & Personal
description: Killing a target within 7m grants +30% weapon damage for 10s.
perfectDescription: Killing a target within 7m grants +38% weapon damage for 10s.

name: Fast Hands
description: Critical hits add a stack of 3% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.
perfectDescription: Critical hits add a stack of 5% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.

name: Sadist
description: Amplifies +30% weapon damage to bleeding enemies. After 4 kills, applies bleed to the next enemy you hit.
perfectDescription: Amplifies +35% weapon damage to bleeding enemies. After 3 kills, applies bleed to the next enemy you hit.

name: Ranger
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 4m you are away from your target.
perfectDescription: Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 3m you are away from your target.

name: Steady Handed
description: Hits grant a stack of +1% Accuracy and Stability. At 100 stacks, consumes stacks to refill the magazine.
perfectDescription: Hits grant a stack of +1% Accuracy and Stability. At 75 stacks, consumes stacks to refill the magazine.

name: Spike
description: Headshots grant +20% skill damage for 15s.
perfectDescription: Headshots grant +25% skill damage for 15s.

name: Perpetuation
description: Headshots grant +75% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown: 20s.
perfectDescription: Headshots grant +75% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown: 16s.

name: Future Perfect
description: Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 15s. Stacks up to 3 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s.
perfectDescription: Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 19s. Stacks up to 4 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s.

name: Flatline
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 15% to pulsed enemies. After 4 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy you hit.
perfectDescription: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to pulsed enemies. After 3 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy you hit.

name: In Sync
description: Hitting an enemy grants +15% skill damage for 5s. Using a skill or damaging an enemy with a skill grants +15% weapon damage for 5s. Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active at the same time.
perfectDescription: Hitting an enemy grants +20% skill damage for 5s. Using a skill or damaging an enemy with a skill grants +20% weapon damage for 5s. Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active at the same time.

name: Soft Spot
description: Destroying a Weakpoint grants 19% Weapon Damage for 15s.
perfectDescription: Destroying a Weakpoint grants 24% Weapon Damage for 15s.

name: Rifleman
description: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus +10% weapon damage for 5s. Max stack is 5. Additional headshots refresh the duration.
perfectDescription: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus +11% weapon damage for 5s. Max stack is 6. Additional headshots refresh the duration.

name: Boomerang
description: Critical hits have a 50% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. If a bullet is returned the next shot gains 40% increased damage.
perfectDescription: Critical hits have a 75% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. If a bullet is returned the next shot gains 50% increased damage.

name: Lucky Shot
description: Magazine capacity is increased by 20%. Missed shots from cover have a 100% chance to return to the magazine.
perfectDescription: Magazine capacity is increased by 30%. Missed shots from cover have a 100% chance to return to the magazine.

name: Determined
description: After killing an enemy with a headshot the next shot landed on any enemy will be a guaranteed headshot.
perfectDescription: After killing an enemy with a headshot the next shot landed on any enemy will be a guaranteed critical headshot.

name: Behind You
description: Amplifies weapon damage by +20% to enemies that are not targeting you.
perfectDescription: Amplifies weapon damage by +25% to enemies that are not targeting you.

name: Precision Strike
description: Killing enemies farther than 20m builds up stacks. Max stack is 3. Hitting an enemy within 20m will use all stacks to provide 20% amplified damage to enemies within 20m for 5s.
perfectDescription: Killing enemies farther than 20m builds up stacks. Max stack is 3. Hitting an enemy within 20m will use all stacks to provide 20% amplified damage to enemies within 20m for 5s.

name: Near Sighted
description: Receive +80% stability at the cost of -35% optimal range.
perfectDescription: Receive +100% stability at the cost of -35% optimal range.

name: On Empty
description: Reloading from empty grants +60% weapon handling for 10s.
perfectDescription: Reloading from empty grants +80% weapon handling for 10s.

name: Measured
description: The top half of the magazine has 25% rate of fire and -25% weapon damage. The bottom half of the magazine has -18% rate of fire and +30% total weapon damage.
perfectDescription: The top half of the magazine has 25% rate of fire and -30% weapon damage. The bottom half of the magazine has -18% rate of fire and +38% total weapon damage.

name: Overflowing
description: Every 3 reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.
perfectDescription: Every 2 reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.

name: Stabilize
description: Firing your weapon increases Weapon Accuracy by 1% and Weapon Stability by 1% per shot up to 60%. If you stop firing, the bonuses reset after 4 seconds.
perfectDescription: Firing your weapon increases Weapon Accuracy by 1% and Weapon Stability by 1% per shot up to 60%. If you stop firing, the bonuses reset after 4 seconds.

name: Naked
description: Hitting an enemy with no armor grants +50% headshot damage for 5s.
perfectDescription: Hitting an enemy with no armor grants +50% headshot damage for 8s.

name: First Blood
description: If scoped, your first shot fired from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deals headshot damage to any part of the body hit. Requires a Scope with 8x magnification or higher.
perfectDescription: If scoped, your first 2 shots fired from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deals headshot damage to any part of the body hit. Requires a Scope with 8x magnification or higher.

name: Outsider
description: After killing an enemy, gain 100% optimal range and +100% accuracy for 10s.
perfectDescription: After killing an enemy, gain 150% optimal range and +125% accuracy for 10s.

name: Unwavering
description: Swapping to this weapon grants +300% weapon handling for 5s. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5s.
perfectDescription: Swapping to this weapon grants +400% weapon handling for 5s. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5s.

name: Unhinged
description: Grants +18% weapon damage at the cost of -25% Stability and -25% Accuracy.
perfectDescription: Grants +22% weapon damage at the cost of -25% Stability and -25% Accuracy.

name: Frenzy
description: For every 10 bullets in the magazine capacity, gain +3% rate of fire and +3% weapon damage for 9s when reloading from empty.
perfectDescription: For every 8 bullets in the magazine capacity, gain +3% rate of fire and +3% weapon damage for 9s when reloading from empty.

name: Overwhelm
description: Suppressing an enemy, that is not currently suppressed, grants +10% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.
perfectDescription: Suppressing an enemy, that is not currently suppressed, grants +12% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.

name: Pummel
description: 3 consecutive kills refills the magazine and grants +40% weapon damage for 10s.
perfectDescription: 2 consecutive kills refills the magazine and grants +40% weapon damage for 10s.

name: Pumped Up
description: Reloading grants +1.2% weapon damage for 10s. Stacks up to 25 times.
perfectDescription: Reloading grants +6% weapon damage for 10s. Stacks up to 5 times.

name: Brazen
description: Receive +3.5% Amplified Damage on the next shot with the weapon for each pellet that hits the target, if at least 6 pellets hit.
perfectDescription: Receive +2%/3% Amplified Damage on the next shot with the weapon for each pellet that hits the target, if at least 4 pellets hit.

name: Salvage
description: Killing a target has a +70% chance to refill the magazine.
perfectDescription: Killing a target has a +85% chance to refill the magazine.

name: Finisher
description: Swapping from this weapon within 10s of killing an enemy grants 30% critical hit chance and 30% critical hit damage for 15s.
perfectDescription: Swapping from this weapon within 10s of killing an enemy grants 35% critical hit chance and 40% critical hit damage for 15s.

name: Adaptive Instincts
description: Hitting 30 headshots grants 20% critical hit chance and 50% critical hit damage for 45s. Hitting 65 body shots grants 90% weapon damage for 45s. Hitting 20 leg shots grants 150% reload speed for 45s. Buffs refresh when out of combat.

name: Eagle Strike
description: Accuracy increases as you continuously fire, up to 30%. Headshot kills grant the Tenacity buff for 15s. The strength of Tenacity is increased by 1% for body shots and 5% for headshots.

name: Tenacity
description: 40-80% of damage taken is delayed until the buff expires. All of the total delayed damage is reduced for each enemy killed while the buff is active, up to 100% with 3 kills.

name: Actum Est
description: Shooting an enemy with this weapon will give 1 stack. At 100 stacks the next magazine will be 100% filled with shock ammo.

name: Big Game Hunter
description: When scoped, switches to semi-automatic fire mode, dealing 450% weapon damage. Headshots grant +6% headshot damage. Stacks up to 25 times. Once at full stacks, 10 stacks decay every 4s.

name: Talent Unnerve
description: Killing an enemy will apply a mark on every enemy within 20m. Max marks per enemy is 5. Marks disappear 10s after the last one. Deal +15% Amplified Damage per mark.

name: Capacitance
description: Shooting enemies builds stacks to a cap of 40. Each stack grants 1.5% Skill Damage. For each skill tier gain 7.5% Weapon Damage.

name: Perturb
description: While holstered for 10s, weapon becomes Primed. Swapping to Primed weapon grants +25% Rate of Fire, +30% Weapon Damage and 100% more Threat for 20s.

name: Bullet Hell
description: This weapon never needs to be reloaded. For every 100 bullets that hit an enemy, replenish ammo to you and all allies' reserves.

name: Disruptor Rounds
description: Shooting marks enemies and adds stacks up to 50. Deploying a non-shield skill triggers effects based on stacks: 1-10 Pulse, 11-25 Disrupt, 26-49 Disorient, 50 all effects within 10m.

name: Ardent
description: Shooting heats up weapon. When the meter is full (50% mag size), rounds ignite enemies.

name: Pakhan
description: Each kill gains a stack of 75% Base Magazine Size increase to the next magazine, up to 4 stacks.

name: Plague of the Outcasts
description: Hits apply a debuff dealing 100% weapon damage over 10s. Stacks up to 50 times.

name: Payment in kind
description: Dealing damage adds a stack of 2% Critical Hit Damage, up to 100 stacks, lasting 10s. On reload apply a 10s bleed to yourself.

name: Incessant Chatter
description: When you reload, rate of fire is increased by 25% for each enemy within 15m. Max stacks: 5. Kills refill 50% magazine.

name: Breathe Free
description: When moving, gain 4-8 stacks per second. Each round fired consumes a stack, amplifying damage by 75%. Kills grant +20% movement speed for 10s.

name: Rule them all
description: When the agent has a Status Effect, 50% of the next magazine applies the same Status Effect.

name: Sandman
description: Melee attacks instantly kill non-elite enemies. Cooldown: 15s.

name: Septic Shock
description: Shooting applies venom stacks (10s). 2-Poison, 4-Disorient, 6-Shock, 9-Target takes 20% additional damage.

name: Binary Trigger
description: Fires on trigger pull and release. If both hit, gain a stack. At 7 stacks, next shot deals 500% amplified damage and 500% explosion damage.

name: Agonizing Bite
description: Marks a random enemy. Hitting consumes mark for guaranteed crit with 20% amplified damage. Afterwards, all shots are guaranteed crits for 5s.

name: Geri and Freki
description:
On trigger pull, fire both barrels at once.
When fired from the right shoulder, hits add offensive primers, and defensive primers when fired drom the left shoulder.
Hits from one shoulder will detonate all of the opposite shoulder's primers when present.
When detonated, each offensive primer deals 100% weapon damage, while each defensive primer grants +4% bonus armor and +10% amplified damage to armor plates for 5s.
Primer effectiveness is doubled at 10 stacks.

name: Transfusion
description: Headshots build stacks (max 8). Healing allies repairs 50% damage per stack. Healed allies receive bonus armor. At max stacks, shots are guaranteed headshots for 8s.

name: Full Stop
description: Shooting builds stacks (cap 20). Headshots grant 2. Each stack grants 2% Weapon Damage and 5% Headshot Damage. Reload grants temp armor based on stacks.

name: High Priority Target
description: Amplifies Weapon Damage by 125% to the highest ranking enemies in combat.

name: Liberty or Death
description: Hits grant +2% weapon damage. Stacks up to 30. Headshots consume all stacks, repairing shield for 3% per stack.

name: Busy Little Bee
description: Each shot to a different target gives 1 stack (max 10). Each stack gives 20% weapon damage on weapon swap for 10s.

name: Mosquito Song
description: Hitting an enemy applies a stack. At 5 stacks, enemy targets you for 5s and takes 25% more damage to armor.

name: Dead Man's Hand
description: Flip a card when landing shots. After 5 cards, next shot amplified by 30%.

name: No Limit
description: Increases Dead Man's Hand damage bonus from 30% to 50%.

name: Ace in the Sleeve
description: Amplifies 1 extra shot when revealing your hand.

name: Stoic
description: +4% Damage Resistance for every enemy targeting you.

name: Polyethylene Plating
description: Increase Stoic Damage Resistance bonus from 4% to 5%.

name: Deceit
description: Enemies targeting your Decoy also count towards Stoic bonus.

name: On Point
description: Hits grant stacks. Reloading grants 2% handling and 4% WD per stack for 10s.

name: Point of Honor
description: Increases On Point Weapon Damage bonus from 4% to 7.2%.

name: Point of no Return
description: Increase On Point bonus timer from 10s to 15s.

name: Charging
description: Each second out of cover grants 5% reduced skill damage. Max 50%.

name: Overcharging
description: Increases Charger max incoming damage protection to 70%.

name: Safe Charging
description: Charging gives 10% protection per second.

name: Camaraderie
description: Marked kills grant 3% WD and 2% CHD per contributor. Max 35 stacks.

name: One for All
description: Increase Weapon Damage bonus per stack from 3% to 5%.

name: All for One
description: Increase max marks from 4 to 8.

name: Indirect Transmission
description: On kill, spread status effects (10m) and refresh 50% duration.

name: Proliferation
description: Increases range to 15m and refresh percentage to 75%.

name: Symptom Aggravator
description: Amplifies damage to status affected targets by 30%.

name: Makeshift Repairs
description: 25% of damage taken is repaired over 10s.

name: Process Refinery
description: Increases Makeshift Repairs from 25% to 35%.

name: Improved Materials
description: Decreases repair time from 10s to 5s.

name: Ground Control
description: 15% total damage when at full armor. Repair proximity allies for 60%.

name: Tactical Superiority
description: Increases Ground Control damage bonus from 15% to 25%.

name: Advanced Combat Tactics
description: Increases Ground Control proximity repair from 60% to 120%.

name: Feedback Loop
description: Skill use/cancel reduces other cooldown by 30s. +10% skill damage/repair.

name: Positive Reinforcement
description: Increases damage and repair bonus from +10% to +25%.

name: Short Circuit
description: Decreases Feedback Loop cooldown from 10s to 5s.

name: Heartstopper
description: Hits on pulsed enemies add +1% bonus armor and +1.1% WD. Max 50.

name: Max BPM
description: Max stack is now 100.

name: Cold
description: Stacks now supply +2% bonus armor.

name: Headache
description: Consecutive headshots grant damage, armor, and magazine refill.

name: Stand Tall
description: Increases bonus Armor from 50% to 100%.

name: Lucky
description: Agents can miss one headshot before resetting cycle.

name: Apex Predator
description: 20% amp damage within 15m. Kills stack 5% damage (Max 5).

name: Endless Hunger
description: Increases stack duration from 10s to 30s.

name: Overwhelming Force
description: Increases disorient radius on kill from 5m to 10m.

name: Huddle
description: +1 skill tier per ally in Hive/Smart cover range. Overcharge at Tier 6.

name: Hivemind
description: Decrease Overcharge cooldown from 40s to 25s.

name: Smart Cooperation
description: Decrease skill destruction cooldown from 10s to 1s.

name: Crowd Control
description: Crits mark targets (Max 3). 60% damage shared between marks.

name: Target Rich Environment
description: Increases mark count from 3 to 5.

name: Critical Measures
description: Increases shared damage from 60% to 112%.

name: Rules of Engagement
description: Kills on marked status enemies grant Hollow-Point ammo (+20% damage).

name: Parabellum Rounds
description: Increases Hollow-Point damage amplification to 50%.

name: Trauma Specialist
description: Increases bleed duration by 50% and damage by 100%.

name: Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype
description: Turret spins 360 and explodes when disabled. Immune to own fire.

name: Chain Combustion
description: Turret fire ignites other enemies within 2m.

name: Heatstroke
description: +25% WD to enemies on fire; +25% Turret Range.

name: Return to Sender
description: Repairs 10% damage dealt by skills (Allies 20%).

name: Increased Interest
description: Increase repairs from 10/20% to 25/35%.

name: Over-engineered
description: Repairs provide Bonus Armor up to 80% total armor.

name: Tend and Befriend
description: Interacting with skills grants +25% skill damage for 10s.

name: Best Buds
description: Increase damage buff from 25% to 50%.

name: Complete Uptime
description: Cancelling skills resets their cooldown.

name: Striker's Gamble
description: Hits grant 0.65% total damage. Max 100.

name: Press the Advantage
description: Increases max stacks from 100 to 200.

name: Risk Management
description: Increases damage per stack from 0.65% to 0.9%.

name: Hackstep Protocol
description: Instant: 50% bonus armor, 20% repair, up to 20% WD.

name: Multithreaded Execution
description: Increases bonus armor from 50% to 100%.

name: Compiler Optimization
description: Decreases cooldown from 20s to 15s.

name: Aggressive Recon
description: Signature kill: 15% Sig Damage and 25% reload speed.

name: Specialized Destruction
description: Increase Sig Damage bonus to 30%.

name: Signature Moves
description: 50% WD after depleting signature ammo.

name: Throttle Control
description: Shooting builds stacks. +0.5% Handling and +4% CHD.

name: Sustainability
description: Increase maximum stacks from 50 to 75.

name: Snowball
description: Increase CHD per stack from 4% to 7%.

name: Red, White and Blue
description: Shooting cycles debuffs. Red (8% Amp), White (2% Armor), Blue (8% Reduction).

name: Waving the Flag
description: Increases debuff rotation speed to 1.5s.

name: Patriotic Boost
description: Increases debuff strength (12% Amp/Reduction, 3% Repair).

name: From the Shadows Into the Light
description: Stacks grant Armor Regen (in cover) or Crit Damage/RPM (out of cover).

name: From the Shadows
description: Increases Max stacks (damage) from 50 to 100 and gain speed.

name: Into the Light
description: Increases Max stacks (armor regen) from 50 to 100 and gain speed.

name: Symphony
description: Kill at ranges to build stacks. At 4 stacks, multi-bonus x1.5 for 15s.

name: Fortissimo
description: Double the weapon dmg bonus from Symphony.

name: Accelerando
description: Decreases number of stacks needed for Symphony from 4 to 3.

name: Perfect Bloodsucker
description: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +12% bonus armor for 10s. Max stack is 10.

name: Perfect Overclock
description: You and allies within 15m of your deployed skills gain +30% reload speed and reduces active cooldowns by 0.6s each second.

name: Perfect Creeping Death
description: When you apply a status effect, it is also applied to all enemies within 10m of your target.

name: Perfectly Unstoppable Force
description: Killing an enemy increases total weapon damage by 7% for 15s. Stacks up to 5. Grenade kills add 2 stacks.

name: Perfectly Wicked
description: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 27s.

name: Perfect Shock and Awe
description: Applying a status effect to an enemy increases total skill damage and repair by 20% for 27s.

name: Perfect Galvanize
description: Applying Blind, Ensnare, Confuse, or Shock to an enemy grants 50% of your armor as bonus armor to you and allies within 30m for 10s.

name: Perfect Adrenaline Rush
description: When you are within 10m of an enemy, gain 23% bonus armor for 5s. Stacks up to 3 times.

name: Perfect Vigilance
description: Increases total weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage disables buff for 3s.

name: Perfect Tech Support
description: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 27s.

name: Perfect Versatile
description: Amplifies total weapon damage for 10s when swapping weapons. 45% for Shotguns/SMGs (15m) or Rifles/MMRs (25m). 20% for LMGs/ARs.

name: Perfect Clutch
description: Below 20% armor, crits repair 2.5% missing armor. On kill, crits repair for 4-10s based on Red cores.

name: Perfectly Calculated
description: Kills from cover reduce skill cooldowns by 15%.

name: Perfectly Opportunistic
description: Enemies hit with shotguns/MMRs take 15% amplified damage from all sources for 5s.

name: Perfect Combined Arms
description: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage by 30% for 3s.

name: Perfectly Tamper Proof
description: Enemies within 3m of specific skills are shocked. Cooldown per skill: 8s.

name: Perfect Energize
description: Using an armor kit grants +1 Skill Tier for 15s. Grants Overcharge if at Tier 6.

name: Perfect Leadership
description: Cover to cover grants 20% bonus armor (60% if near enemy) for 10s.

name: Fireworks Show
description: Concussion grenades become Festive Grenades. Hitting an enemy causes explosions around two others within 20m.

name: Perfect Companion
description: Within 10m of ally/skill, total weapon damage is increased by 20%.

name: Perfect Intimidate
description: While holding bonus armor, gain 3 stacks per second (Max 10). Each increases WD by 4% within 10m.

name: Perfectly Efficient
description: 75% chance to not consume armor kit. Spec kit bonuses increased 100%.

name: Perfect Headhunter
description: Headshot kill grants next hit bonus damage equal to 150% of the killing blow for 30s. Cap 800-1250%.

name: Perfect Vanguard
description: Deploying shield makes it invulnerable for 5s and grants 50% armor as bonus armor to allies for 20s.

name: Perfect Braced
description: While in cover weapon handling is increased by +50%.

name: Perfect Glass Cannon
description: All damage dealt amplified by 30%. All damage taken amplified by 60%.

name: Perfect Unbreakable
description: When armor is depleted, repair 100% of armor.

name: Perfect Overwatch
description: After 8s in cover, increase ally WD and skill damage by 14%.

name: Perfect Spark
description: Damaging an enemy with a skill increases total weapon damage by 18% for 20s.

name: Perfectly Skilled
description: Skill kills have a 30% chance to reset skill cooldowns.

name: Perfect Spotter
description: Amplifies total weapon and skill damage by 20% to pulsed enemies.

name: Perfect Trauma
description: Blind on headshot, bleed on chest hit. Cooldown 20s.

name: Perfectly Mad Bomber
description: Grenade radius +75%. Refund on kill. Can be cooked. 15% bonus armor while aiming.

name: Perfect Entrench
description: Below 30% armor, headshots from cover repair 30% armor. Cooldown 2s.

name: Perfect Focus
description: Increases total weapon damage by 6% every second while aiming (8x scope+), up to 60%.

name: Perfect Protected Reload
description: +40% bonus armor while reloading. Grants up to 30% armor to allies based on Blue cores.

name: Perfectly Explosive Delivery
description: Thrown skills explode 1.5s after landing (5m). Explosions repeat every 5s.

name: Perfect Obliterate
description: Critical hits increase total weapon damage by 1% for 10s. Stacks up to 24 times.

name: Flurry
description: Status effects apply snowfall to target.

name: Bewildered
description: When dealing Weapon Damage to an enemy, 50% of the damage will be dealt to another enemy within 30m instead. When there are no enemies nearby, deal damage normally. Does not apply to Armor Plates.

name: Toxic Delivery
description: Status effects also apply a damage over time debuff for 10s. Total Damage dealt is equal to 50% of your concussion grenade damage and increased by your status effect attributes.

name: Vicious Cycle
description: Taking damage builds stacks to a cap of 30. Each stack grants 1.5% Weapon Damage. Taking damage at max stacks triggers a purge, removing status effects and dropping a healing cloud (5% Max Armor for 10s).

name: Pack Instincts
description: Bonus based on distance of the last enemy hit. 0-15m: +25% CHD; 15-25m: +10% CHC and +10% CHD; 25m+: +25% CHC.

name: Catalysis
description: Dealing/receiving status effects builds stacks (Max 12). Each stack grants +2% WD and +2% Status Effects. Stacks decay if no enemies nearby.

name: Abridged
description: If Primary and Secondary are non-exotic/named and same type, Secondary talent applies to Primary. No swap talents.

name: One in the Hand...
description: Throwing a grenade refunds it and grants +1 skill tier (or Overcharge) for 15s. Cooldown: 60s.

name: Combat Medic
description: Revive speed +80%. Provides 50% damage resistance during revive. Successful revives provide +1 Skill Tier for 5s (Overcharge for 15s at Tier 6).

name: Kill Confirmed
description: Kills drop trophies. Short term (10s): 5% WD (Red), 10% Bonus Armor (Blue), 5% Skill Eff (Yellow). Long term (300s): +1% WD, +1% Skill Eff, +0.1% Regen per trophy. Max 30.

name: Resourceful
description: Fulfills requirements for unlocking Gear/Brand set bonuses. Can unlock multiple sets simultaneously.

name: Hoarder
description: +50% Grenade Radius, +35% Damage. Extra +25% damage per enemy caught. Regenerate grenades every 30s.

name: Bond
description: Allies within 10m: +30% CHD, +15% Skill Eff, +2% Armor Regen. Skill within 10m: half bonus. Highest active.

name: Ablative Nano-Plating
description: On armor break, ally gains 80% of your armor as bonus armor for 10s. Cooldown removed on specialization kill.

name: Bleeding Edge
description: Hits within 15m apply bleed. Repair 3-48% armor per second based on number of bleeding enemies (up to 5) within 15m.

name: Over the top
description: Grenade damage or melee activates Seeing Red: +25% total weapon damage and +100% melee damage for 20s. Cooldown: 60s (reset on melee/grenade).

name: Transference Overclock
description: 15% Hive haste per tier. Detonating hive refreshes skill cooldowns and grants Overcharge for 15s. Ally cooldown: 120s.

name: Weakest Link
description: Amplifies Weapon Damage by 30% to the lowest ranking enemies (Tier 3).

name: Counter
description: Swapping weapons cycles bonuses: 1. +20% RoF/WD; 2. +50% Mag/Reload. Active for 12s.

name: Quick Draw
description: Pistol holstered: gain stack every 0.3s (Max 100). Next shot deals +10% damage per stack and headshot damage.

name: Defibrillator
description: Shock stun reduced 50%. Shield melee +100%. Melee with St. Elmo's applies shock (5m radius with full set). Cooldown: 15s.

name: Alternating Current
description: Gain 3% skill damage per second on one skill (Max 10). After 10s at cap, stacks transfer to other skill.

name: Stand Your Ground
description: Explosion immunity. +3% total weapon damage per second stationary (Max 10). Stacks lost 10s after moving.

name: Escape Plan
description: Vaulting/Stationary/Status Effect grant 10-20% movement speed. 50% movement impairment reduction.

name: Ostracize
description: Marked enemy deals 600% amp damage to you. You deal 20% amp damage to unmarked enemies.

name: Parkour!
description: Cover-to-cover or vaulting reloads weapon and grants 25% bonus armor for 5s.
